subtitle: A single, modern home block for learners — courses, progress, due dates, grades, badges, certificates, calendar and profile, all in one place, with nothing new to host.
shortDescription: One personalized home for every Moodle learner — courses, progress, due dates, grades, badges and certificates in a single block, plus a learning transcript, course library and inline profile editing.
intro: Modern Learner Dashboard gives every learner one focused home on the Moodle Dashboard. Instead of hunting across My courses, the gradebook, the calendar and their profile, learners see enrolled courses, completion, due-soon activities, grades, badges and certificates in a single, tabbed block.

It runs entirely on core Moodle APIs — no external service, no new database tables, no cron tasks — surfaces a searchable course library for self-enrolment, lets learners edit their own profile inline, and is theme-aware, fast (lazy-loaded tabs) and privacy-clean.

guarantee.alt: 30-day money-back guarantee — try it for 30 days; if it doesn't work as described and our support can't resolve it, we'll refund 100%

featuregroups.heading: Unified learner overview
items: One block on the Dashboard, rendered full-width with the header hidden
Overview stats: enrolled courses, completion rate, completed activities and due-soon items
Grade average, badge count, certificate count and courses completed this year
Tabbed layout: Overview, Continue learning, Course Library, My courses, Calendar, Grades, Badges, Certificates and Profile

featuregroups.heading: Continue learning & My courses
items: 'Continue learning' lists recently-accessed courses with progress bars and resume links
Configurable recent-course count (4, 8, 12, 16 or 24), with a grid or list view toggle
'My courses' lists every enrolment with progress, category and completion
Search, filter and sort by title, progress, recent activity or category
My-courses stats band: enrolled, completed courses, completed activities, completed quizzes and completed this year

featuregroups.heading: Learning transcript & training record
items: A completed-training record of every finished course, in one collapsible panel
Each row shows category, completion date, activity completion and grade average
Direct links to the issued Course Certificate for each completed course
An at-a-glance compliance and audit view for the learner

featuregroups.heading: Course Library & discovery
items: Browse visible courses the learner is not yet enrolled in
Catalog stats: available courses, categories, activities and certificates
Filter by category, enrolment status and course status; search by title, short name or category
Sort and paginate large catalogues
Self-enrol straight from the library

featuregroups.heading: Achievements: badges & certificates
items: Earned Moodle badges with issuer and issue date, split by active, expired and course badges
Course Certificates with code, issue and expiry dates (when mod_coursecertificate is installed)
Certificate tab degrades gracefully if Course Certificate isn't present

featuregroups.heading: Calendar & grades
items: Embedded core monthly calendar with a separate upcoming-events panel and a 'View full calendar' link
Grades tab: a per-course table of progress, status and grade average
Overall grade average surfaced on the overview

featuregroups.heading: Inline profile editing
items: Edit name, email, city, country, department and institution from the dashboard
Upload, change or remove the profile picture
Editable custom profile fields, with an email-change confirmation step
Permission-aware: locked and external-auth fields stay read-only

featuregroups.heading: Configuration & branding
items: Show or hide the page header per block instance
Recent-course limit and date format (US / day-first / ISO / long)
Custom loading spinner: size, colour or your own image (GIF / SVG / PNG / JPG / WebP)
Scoped custom CSS per instance — no theme edits

featuregroups.heading: Performance & architecture
items: Tabs lazy-load over AJAX via dedicated web services
Site-wide counts cached for five minutes to spare the database
No new database tables — nothing stored outside Moodle core
No cron or background tasks to manage

featuregroups.heading: Privacy & security
items: Null privacy provider — the block stores no personal data of its own
Capability-gated read and write web services
sesskey-protected profile saves and sanitised input
Custom CSS has style/script tags stripped (XSS-safe)

featuregroups.heading: Platform & support
items: Built on core Completion, Enrolment, Calendar, Badges and Grades APIs
Full-width, header-less block designed for the Dashboard
Tested on Boost, Boost Union, Classic, Moove, Academi, Adaptable and Degrade
Moodle 4.5–5.2, PHP 8.3, stable, GPLv3 — clean uninstall, no orphaned data

title: One dashboard replaces five
checks: Courses, completion, due-soon, grades, badges, certificates, calendar and profile in one block
Lives full-width on the Dashboard with the block header hidden
Fewer places to look means fewer 'where do I find it?' support requests
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The dashboard 'home' shot — the welcome hero plus the overview stats grid (enrolled courses, completion rate, completed activities, due soon, grade average, badges, certificates) and the row of tabs. Capture the Dashboard at /my/, the .block_modernlearnerdashboard region, light UI, 16:9 crop.

title: Drop-in, zero infrastructure
checks: Built only on core APIs — Completion, Enrolment, Calendar, Badges and Grades
No external service to host and no new database tables
Add the block to the Dashboard and you're done
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The 'Add a block' drawer on the Dashboard with 'Modern Learner Dashboard' highlighted in the block list (turn editing on at /my/, open Add a block). Alternatively the Plugins overview row showing block_modernlearnerdashboard installed. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Privacy sign-off in minutes
checks: Null privacy provider — the block stores no personal data of its own
It only displays data Moodle already holds about the learner
Nothing new to add to your GDPR data map
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The Plugin privacy registry entry for 'Modern Learner Dashboard' showing the 'does not store any personal data' statement. Capture Site administration > Users > Privacy and policies > Plugin privacy registry (/admin/tool/dataprivacy/pluginregistry.php), scrolled to block_modernlearnerdashboard. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Works with the theme you already run
checks: Tested on Boost, Boost Union, Classic, Moove, Academi, Adaptable and Degrade
Ships theme-specific style overrides so it looks native, not bolted-on
No theme migration or front-end rebuild required
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The same dashboard block shown under two different themes side by side (e.g. Boost and Moove, or Boost and Adaptable) to prove it adapts. Capture /my/ under each theme and compose two crops side by side. 16:9, light UI.

title: Fast on big sites
checks: Tabs lazy-load over AJAX — the page paints before the data arrives
Site-wide counts are cached for five minutes to spare the database
Performance stays flat as enrolment numbers grow
image: IMAGE TO ADD: A tab mid-load showing the custom loading spinner (the loading indicator from templates/loading.mustache) as a tab's content streams in. Capture /my/ and click a tab (e.g. Course Library) to catch the loader. Alternatively the block instance loader settings (size/colour/image). 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Drives course re-entry
checks: 'Continue learning' surfaces recently-accessed courses with progress bars
One click resumes exactly where the learner left off
Re-entry is the single biggest lever on completion rates
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The 'Continue learning' tab — the row/grid of recent course cards with thumbnails, progress bars, last-access and a Resume link. Capture /my/, the .block_modernlearnerdashboard Continue learning view. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Cuts profile-admin tickets
checks: Learners edit name, email, picture and profile fields inline
Auth rules are respected — locked and external-auth fields stay locked
Self-service means fewer manual profile changes for your team
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The 'My profile' tab in edit mode — the profile picture control plus editable name, email, city, country, department, institution and any custom fields. Capture /my/, the Profile tab of .block_modernlearnerdashboard. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: A course storefront on the Dashboard
checks: A searchable, filterable Course Library shows what learners can take next
Self-enrolment turns browsing into enrolment without admin involvement
Drives uptake of optional and compliance courses
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The 'Course Library' tab — the search box, category/status filters, sort control and a grid of course cards for courses the learner isn't enrolled in, with an enrol action. Capture /my/, the Course Library tab. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Achievement made visible
checks: Earned badges and Course Certificates are surfaced front-and-centre
Visible progress and rewards keep learners coming back
Certificate tab degrades gracefully without mod_coursecertificate
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The Badges tab (a grid of earned badges with issuer and dates) and/or the Certificates tab (issued certificates with code and dates). Capture /my/, the Badges and Certificates tabs of .block_modernlearnerdashboard — compose both if space allows. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: An audit-ready training record
checks: A 'Learning transcript' panel records every completed course in one place
Each row shows completion date, activity completion, grade average and the certificate
An at-a-glance compliance view for the learner — and for you
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The 'Learning transcript' panel on the My courses tab, expanded to show the Completed training records table (Course, Category, Completion date, Activity completion, Grade average, Certificate, Open). Open /my/, the My courses tab, and click the 'Learning transcript' button to expand the panel. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Never miss a deadline
checks: An embedded monthly calendar shows course events and due dates at a glance
A separate upcoming-events panel lists what's next, with a link to the full calendar
A 'Due soon' count on the overview flags approaching deadlines before they slip
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The Calendar tab — the embedded monthly calendar grid alongside the 'Upcoming events' panel and the 'View full calendar' action. Open /my/, the Calendar tab of .block_modernlearnerdashboard. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Brand it without touching theme code
checks: Per-instance recent-course count and date format
Custom loading spinner — set size, colour or upload your own image
Scoped custom CSS for fine-tuning — no theme edits
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The block instance configuration form — the 'Configure Modern Learner Dashboard block' settings showing recent-course limit, date format, loader size/colour, loader image upload and the custom CSS textarea. Capture the block's Configure form (gear menu > Configure on /my/). 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Secure by construction
checks: Capability-gated web services and sesskey-protected writes
Input is sanitised; custom CSS has style and script tags stripped
Nothing a learner can turn against the site
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The capability overview for the block — the two capabilities block/modernlearnerdashboard:addinstance and :myaddinstance with their permitted roles. Capture Site administration > Users > Permissions > Capability overview (/admin/tool/capability) filtered to 'modernlearnerdashboard', or the Define roles capability list. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: No lock-in, clean uninstall
checks: Writes no data of its own, so there's nothing to orphan
Remove the block and Moodle is exactly as before
Trial it with zero long-term commitment
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The plugin uninstall confirmation for 'Modern Learner Dashboard' (Site administration > Plugins > Plugins overview > Uninstall) showing it removes cleanly. Alternatively the Plugins overview row with the Uninstall link. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Current and supported
checks: Moodle 4.5–5.2, PHP 8.3, stable maturity, GPLv3
CI-tested across Moodle versions and seven themes
Actively maintained 1.4.x release line
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The Plugins overview entry for 'Modern Learner Dashboard' showing version 1.4.17, the supported Moodle range and the Stable maturity badge. Capture Site administration > Plugins > Plugins overview (/admin/plugins.php), the block_modernlearnerdashboard row. 16:9 crop, light UI.

headline: Convinced?
